title: Google Cloud Fundamentals: Core Infrastructure
description: Introduction to Google Cloud infrastructure and core services.

title: Machine Learning Crash Course
description: Google's fast-paced, practical introduction to machine learning.

description: Deploy ML models with TensorFlow in various environments.

description: Design and build infrastructure on Google Compute Engine.

title: Preparing for Google Cloud Certification: Cloud DevOps Engineer
description: Prepare for the Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer certification.

description: Implement security controls and best practices in Google Cloud.
prerequisites: Basic knowledge in the subject area recommended

title: Data Engineering on Google Cloud
description: Build data pipelines with BigQuery, Pub/Sub, and Dataflow.
prerequisites: Basic knowledge in the subject area recommended
